description: CompositionBlue atoll round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% organic cotton, softly ribbed neckline with fabric tape detailing on the inseam, brand logo printed at the back of the neck, collection logo printed on left sleeve and graphic print on the front with letteringFittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash with like colours in cool water at 30 degrees Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Do not dry clean Pay tribute to Usain Bolt in this blue atoll t-shirt from puma. Salute the Jamaican sprinter and Olympic champion, as you chill out in this smart tee. Pair it with jeans or shorts for a great look. Take a leaf out of his book and sprint to freedom!Model StatisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-19"
